column2: Verify Financial Incentive Impact on Assessor Judgement
column3: ['Check if the remuneration of the assessors involved in assessment activities depends on the results of such assessments. ', 'Verify that persons who are authorised to instruct do not conduct assessments for the same students or cohorts of students. ', 'Confirm that the CAA does not accept results from trainers/assessors with financial incentives that could affect their judgement. ']
column4: ['The remuneration should not depend on the results of assessments. ', 'Assessors should not be involved in multiple assessments or cohorts of students. ', 'The CAA should reject these assessment results. ']
